title: eschscholzia californica var. douglasii
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. douglasii, commonly known as the 'Douglas's California Poppy' or 'Golden Poppy', is a variety of the California Poppy plant, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be made from its flowers and leaves, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
